brain.commentary: The slate is tilted toward high‑beta tech and volatile crypto, with several flat positions showing negative composites and weak alpha. This raises draw‑down risk, especially if a tech correction occurs. We therefore dial back exposure on the most fragile signals (MSFT, AMZN, TSLA, META, BTC/USD, ETH/USD, SOL/USD, LTC/USD) and modestly boost the core market beta and lower‑vol equities.
